creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do in Florida? 👀 This spot (plus 1,000+ more) is in my Florida Travel Guide + Interactive Map perfect for weekend getaways, road trips, and exploring without hours of research and stress! 💬 Comment “GUIDE” and I’ll send it to you! 

@discoverycove is an all-inclusive day resort with beer, wine, breakfast, snacks, lunch, a pizza bar, slushies, coffee, and tea included in the price.

You can swim and snorkel in the Grand Reef (they provide masks, snorkels, and wetsuits). They also have animal-safe sunscreen stations throughout the park.

Feed the birds in the aviary (best time is in the morning). Float down the warm lazy river through a tropical oasis and waterfalls.

Book a private cabana with snacks, drinks, seating, and cover. There are also covered areas and umbrellas throughout the park.

Discovery Cove keeps the guest count manageable, so it never feels crowded or has lines. It’s the perfect daycation!

Send to a friend who love this place!

#discoverycove #orlandoFlorida #thingstodoinorlando #snorkel #allinclusive

transcription.text: Here's how to have an epic day at this all-inclusive day resort in Orlando, Florida. Discovery Cove is a family-friendly, all-inclusive day resort where you can swim with stingrays and tropical fish, and it feels like you're on a tropical island right in the middle of Orlando. We arrived at our private cabana overlooking the dolphin swim area, which was stocked with snacks and drinks, and it was a perfect retreat when we wanted some alone time. Next, we went over to Laguna Grill for all-you-can-eat breakfast, which has everything you can imagine, and then we went to swim with the stingrays and tropical fish in the Grand Reef. You are allowed to gently pet the stingrays, and this was the highlight for me. Next, we went to the Lazy River, which was beautiful and relaxing and winds through tropical gardens and waterfalls. Pro tip, go to the aviary to feed the birds in the morning when they're still hungry. Lunch is served from 11 to 3.30, and it actually surprised me at how good the food was, and remember, it's all-you-can-eat. Next, we did the dolphin swim with Gala where we learned so much about dolphins. We upgraded with the drinks package to enjoy some delicious mixed drinks at multiple tiki bars around the park. Included in your all-inclusive day is free parking, wetsuits, snorkel gear, animal-safe sunscreen, lockers, unlimited food, snacks and drinks, and shower facilities. They even do weddings here. Send this to a friend who would love a trip to Discovery Cove.
